prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In the colorful coral reef, there lived a little octopus named Ollie. Ollie was very shy and loved to hide among the swaying sea plants, watching the other sea creatures play. More than anything, Ollie wished to have friends to laugh and explore with, but he wasn’t sure how to say hello. One sunny morning, Ollie took a deep breath, spread his eight arms wide, and decided today would be the day he made a new friend.
